experiments.note: Exact as level degeneracy & reproduces period lengths via n+l rule; pure-2n^2 nesting alone does NOT give noble-gas closures (Aufbau needed).

Paper's Kc=2 sigma/pi is wrong by sqrt(2pi)~2.51 even for Gaussian; correct law Kc=2/(pi g(0)) (=1.596 sigma Gaussian). Simulation confirms corrected law; 2 sigma/pi fails for uniform/Lorentzian/bimodal.
Predicted L0=2.443e-8; measured mean 2.511e-8 over 11 metals, 20/22 within 15%. (Reproduces standard physics; not a novel prediction.)
On real Sleep-EDF EEG the cross-channel order parameter gives W>REM>N1>N2>N3, INVERTING the claimed N3>W>N1>N2>REM (N3 lowest). Channel-geometry caveat noted; claim must be cut or heavily scoped.
log(kcat/Km) vs substrate heavy-atom count: Pearson r=-0.67 (p=0.05), matches claimed ~-0.57 in sign/magnitude; but weak (r^2=0.45), Spearman -0.40, extremes-driven. Qualitative only.
Cipriani 2018 ORs cluster tightly (CV=0.10); binding breadth does not predict response (r=0.39, n.s.). Supports convergence; aperture mechanism is one interpretation, not proven cause.
>=14 orders-of-magnitude resistivity drop (operationally exact zero) at sharp Tc across 10 superconductors + He-4 lambda. Reproduces BCS/Landau phenomenology; does not predict Tc.
Four representation-DISJOINT agents (digits) agree on labels 0.51 vs 0.10 chance; when all agree (29%) they are 100% correct. Real instance of coordination without shared representation.

Ensemble error 0.16 < best individual 0.26 (composition lowers floor). But exact multiplicative law assumes independence agents violate (err-corr 0.15); state as independence-limit bound, not equality.

headline: 9 external experiments against public data. 2 confirmed outright, 5 confirmed-with-scope, 2 corrections forced by data (Kuramoto Kc factor; sleep-stage ordering). Unlike the original self-referential suite, these test claims against data the framework did not generate, and two of them changed the papers.
